title: The String of ISIS Attacks That Killed Three Generations of One Afghan Family
content: Over two weeks, the Rajabis suffered loss after loss as suicide attacks on Shiite mosques in two parts of the country ravaged their family.

more_info.byline: By Christina Goldbaum, Yaqoob Akbary and Jim Huylebroek

en_title: The String of ISIS Attacks That Killed Three Generations of One Afghan Family
en_content: Over two weeks, the Rajabis suffered loss after loss as suicide attacks on Shiite mosques in two parts of the country ravaged their family.

title: After Sierra Leone Explosion, a Health System Is Strained
content: Victims are still dying from injuries after a fuel tanker burst into flames last week in Sierra Leone, a country that has no burn units.

more_info.byline: By Mara Kardas-Nelson and Ruth Maclean

en_title: After Sierra Leone Explosion, a Health System Is Strained
en_content: Victims are still dying from injuries after a fuel tanker burst into flames last week in Sierra Leone, a country that has no burn units.

title: In Cuba, Desires for Food and Freedom May Spark a Rare Day of Protest
content: Young dissidents who rely on the internet to spread their ideas are calling for a protest on Monday, a bold move with little precedent in Cuba.
en_title: In Cuba, Desires for Food and Freedom May Spark a Rare Day of Protest
en_content: Young dissidents who rely on the internet to spread their ideas are calling for a protest on Monday, a bold move with little precedent in Cuba.

title: Queen Elizabeth Misses Remembrance Service Because of Sprained Back
content: The British monarch, 95, has put off multiple trips and engagements recently, and the latest cancellation has deepened anxiety about her health. She has now been out of sight since mid-October.

per_facet: Elizabeth II, Queen of Great Britain

en_title: Queen Elizabeth Misses Remembrance Service Because of Sprained Back
en_content: The British monarch, 95, has put off multiple trips and engagements recently, and the latest cancellation has deepened anxiety about her health. She has now been out of sight since mid-October.

title: Urbanites Flock to Atlantic Canada as Pandemic Blunts Cities’ Appeal
content: As housing prices soar in big cities, the country’s eastern provinces are experiencing a surge in migration. Newcomers are being welcomed, but some locals are wary.
en_title: Urbanites Flock to Atlantic Canada as Pandemic Blunts Cities’ Appeal
en_content: As housing prices soar in big cities, the country’s eastern provinces are experiencing a surge in migration. Newcomers are being welcomed, but some locals are wary.

title: Migrants Say Belarusians Took Them to E.U. Border and Supplied Wire Cutters

title: India Wants to Send Wheat to Ease Afghan Hunger Crisis. Pakistan Has Yet to OK Transit.
content: Indian officials say Islamabad is dragging its feet on a request of transit for 50,000 tons of wheat to Afghanistan, where nine million people are on the brink of starvation.

title: Dictator’s Son Says Daughter of Duterte Will Back Him in Philippine Election
content: Ferdinand Marcos Jr., who hopes to succeed Rodrigo Duterte as president, said Sara Duterte would effectively be his running mate.

title: Deep Underground, a Chinese Miner Discovered Poetry in the Toil
content: Chen Nianxi has risen to fame as a “migrant worker poet,” adding the voice of China’s often-invisible laborers to the cultural conversation.

title: Sudanese Security Forces Fire on Protesters as Military Tightens Grip
content: At least five people were killed and several wounded as the police fired bullets and tear gas at demonstrators in Sudan’s capital, two days after the army chief signed a contentious decree.

title: Migrant Crisis in Belarus Tests Putin’s Uneasy Alliance With Lukashenko

title: Ethiopian Civil War Sparks Rancorous Debate Over Immigration to Israel
content: Thousands of relatives of the remnants of Ethiopian Jewry are waiting to be airlifted to Israel. For now, the Israeli government sees no urgency.

title: What is tromethamine? It is used to stabilize Covid vaccines.
content: Also known as tris, the compound helps maintain the pH of vaccines, extending shelf life at warmer temperatures.

title: How the U.S. Hid an Airstrike That Killed Dozens of Civilians in Syria
content: The military never conducted an independent investigation into a 2019 bombing on the last bastion of the Islamic State, despite concerns about a secretive commando force.

title: Portugal bars companies from contacting employees off hours and requires other protections for remote work.
content: A new law, passed on Friday and in effect this weekend, is one of the world’s boldest efforts to regulate the remote work that the pandemic forced on many in the industrialized world.

title: As Hackers Take Down Newfoundland’s Health Care System, Silence Descends
content: The province has said little about a cyberattack that delayed or canceled medical procedures and leaked personal information.
en_title: As Hackers Take Down Newfoundland’s Health Care System, Silence Descends
en_content: The province has said little about a cyberattack that delayed or canceled medical procedures and leaked personal information.

title: Oklahoma’s governor puts an opponent of vaccine mandates in charge of the National Guard.
content: The governor, Kevin Stitt, is one of a number of Republican state officials across the country who has been fighting against President Biden’s vaccine mandates.
en_title: Oklahoma’s governor puts an opponent of vaccine mandates in charge of the National Guard.
en_content: The governor, Kevin Stitt, is one of a number of Republican state officials across the country who has been fighting against President Biden’s vaccine mandates.

title: 2 Ivory Smugglers Captured in International Operation, U.S. Says
content: The men were captured by relying on DNA sampling from a previously seized ivory haul, which helped experts pinpoint the location of poached elephants.
en_title: 2 Ivory Smugglers Captured in International Operation, U.S. Says
en_content: The men were captured by relying on DNA sampling from a previously seized ivory haul, which helped experts pinpoint the location of poached elephants.

content: Danny Fenster was given the toughest possible sentence on three charges, in a signal that the country’s military rulers would not bow to international pressure.
